title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to Salesforce automation reliability, with better handling of state and country picklists and more robust deployment workflows. We also resolved critical issues that were preventing HubSpot automations from starting properly and improved overall platform stability.

entries.headline: Salesforce automations better handle state and country fields
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce uses state and country picklists instead of text fields
Your deployment workflows run more reliably with improved permission checking
Field mapping works more accurately when referencing location-based data

entries.headline: Salesforce multi-step deployments run more reliably
